notes: Chronological story arc: cover hook, back tracklists, trilogy fan-out, CF2 reveal, red-vinyl pull finale. ~29.6s for a 3xLP box per release-types targets. | review r1: cover seg starts 1.5s (fully framed); finale ends 61.3s while red vinyl still held high | review r2: finale trimmed to 60.3s - red vinyl at full reveal
